metadata.description: Cursor CLI plugins to use in Claude Code for delegation and code review.

plugins.name: cursor
plugins.description: Use Cursor's CLI (cursor-agent) from Claude Code to delegate coding tasks and review code, choosing the model per call. Shells out to your locally installed, authenticated cursor-agent (no data is sent to the plugin author). Registers session-lifecycle hooks and an optional, off-by-default stop-time review gate.
